# reveal.js Upstream

The learnordie slide engine vendors a controlled, reduced source snapshot of selected reveal.js core modules.

Canonical product repository:

- https://github.com/metric-space-ai/learnordie

Upstream source:

- https://github.com/hakimel/reveal.js

Pinned release:

- reveal.js 6.0.1

Pinned upstream commit:

- 52c6c8b2a9626915cfaa8a87ae47add261f282be

Imported paths:

- `src/LICENSE`
- `src/package.json`
- `src/README.md`
- `src/css/layout.scss`
- `src/css/print/paper.scss`
- `src/css/print/pdf.scss`
- `src/css/reset.css`
- `src/css/reveal.scss`
- `src/js/components/playback.js`
- `src/js/config.ts`
- `src/js/controllers/autoanimate.js`
- `src/js/controllers/backgrounds.js`
- `src/js/controllers/controls.js`
- `src/js/controllers/focus.js`
- `src/js/controllers/fragments.js`
- `src/js/controllers/jumptoslide.js`
- `src/js/controllers/keyboard.js`
- `src/js/controllers/location.js`
- `src/js/controllers/notes.js`
- `src/js/controllers/overlay.js`
- `src/js/controllers/overview.js`
- `src/js/controllers/plugins.js`
- `src/js/controllers/pointer.js`
- `src/js/controllers/printview.js`
- `src/js/controllers/progress.js`
- `src/js/controllers/scrollview.js`
- `src/js/controllers/slidecontent.js`
- `src/js/controllers/slidenumber.js`
- `src/js/controllers/touch.js`
- `src/js/index.ts`
- `src/js/reveal.d.ts`
- `src/js/reveal.js`
- `src/js/utils/color.ts`
- `src/js/utils/constants.ts`
- `src/js/utils/device.ts`
- `src/js/utils/loader.ts`
- `src/js/utils/util.ts`

Intentionally excluded:

- `demo.html`
- `index.html`
- `dist/`
- `css/theme/`
- `css/theme/fonts/`
- `dist/plugin/`
- `external plugin examples`
